description: Letter of complaint to Avraham ha-Kohen b. Yiṣḥaq b. Furat (mid 11th century) about the Christian governor Ibn Gorgas, who built a church next to a mosque, sparking a controversy that the writers say is endangering the Jews. Gil published the left side of the letter, T-S 13J22.6, in 1983 (Palestine, doc. 404), then published the right side of the letter, T-S 13J7.6, in 1991 (article containing corrections and additions to Palestine).
tags: communal, arrest, interconfessional conflict, church, Officials, tax, complaints, State
